commands.review_summary:
The PR changes ClawBench run workspaces from `$OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/workspace/clawbench/<task>` to `$OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/workspace-clawbench/<task>`.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection is enough to reproduce the current behavior: main builds run workspaces under `$OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/workspace/clawbench/<task>`. I did not run the harness because this cleanup review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; maintainer review should decide whether to accept the intentional workspace path compatibility change as-is or ask for a targeted test/note.

target.title: fix: isolate clawbench workspaces from main agent
target.body:
## Summary

Move clawbench run workspaces from `workspace/clawbench/` to `workspace-clawbench/` so benchmark agents don't nest inside the main agent's workspace tree.

## Verified

```
$ openclaw agents

- main (default)
  Workspace: $OPENCLAW_HOME/.openclaw/workspace

- clawbench-t1-fs-quick-note-run-0-e33ac3
  Workspace: $OPENCLAW_HOME/.openclaw/workspace-clawbench/t1-fs-quick-note/run-0-e9af9748
```

Tested on host machine and Docker container.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: robinnarsinghranabhat
